title: vigna reticulata var. linearifolia
intro: Vigna reticulata var. linearifolia, also known as the Indian kidney bean or Bengal gram, is a type of climbing legume native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vigna reticulata var. linearifolia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Herbal preparations of Vigna reticulata var. linearifolia are commonly made into teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
